name: Leo Tolstoy
title: Novelist
bio: Russian writer regarded as one of the greatest authors of all time. Best known for 'War and Peace' and 'Anna Karenina.'
faith: After a spiritual crisis in midlife, Tolstoy underwent a profound Christian conversion. He devoted the latter part of his life to understanding and following the teachings of Jesus, writing 'A Confession' and 'The Kingdom of God Is Within You.'

sources.title: Leo Tolstoy — Wikipedia
sources.note: Biography including his spiritual crisis and Christian conversion

sources.title: A Confession — Wikipedia
sources.note: Tolstoy's account of his spiritual crisis and turn to Christ

sources.title: The Kingdom of God Is Within You
sources.note: By Tolstoy. His treatise on Christian nonviolence that influenced Gandhi

tagline: Abandoned literary fame to follow the teachings of Jesus
